player_notes.tyrese maxey: Maxey is fully healthy for the first time in months, reuniting the 76ers' Big Three with Embiid and George. Boosts his minutes/usage outlook vs. Miami tonight.
player_notes.miles mcbride: Returned from hernia surgery vs. OKC but appeared to re-injure himself and exited early. Likely questionable or out vs. Houston tonight; monitor status.

game_notes.PHI vs MIA: Maxey confirmed healthy and back in full role for PHI; all three stars (Embiid, George, Maxey) available, elevating their prop ceilings.
game_notes.NYK vs HOU: McBride may be out after re-aggravating injury; could shift ball-handling/usage to other Knicks guards.
